children.heading: .—Operation
children.label: a .—Operation
children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force may operate the Air Force education and training facility known as the Inter-European Air Forces Academy (in this section referred to as the “Academy”).
members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization;
signatories to the Partnership for Peace Framework Documents; or

children.label: A
children.text: within the United States Africa Command area of responsibility; and

children.label: B
children.text: eligible for assistance under chapter 5 of part II of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 ( et seq.).22 U.S.C. 2347

children.heading: .—Concurrence of secretary of state
children.label: 1 .—Concurrence of secretary of state
children.text: Military personnel of a country may be provided education and training under this section only with the concurrence of the Secretary of State.

children.heading: .—Assistance otherwise prohibited by law
children.label: 2 .—Assistance otherwise prohibited by law
children.text: Education and training may not be provided under this section to the military personnel of any country that is otherwise prohibited from receiving such type of assistance under any other provision of law.
Transportation incident to such education and training.
Supplies and equipment to be used during such education and training.
Billeting, food, and health services in connection with the receipt of such education and training.

children.heading: .—Living Allowance
children.label: e .—Living Allowance
children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force may pay to a person receiving education and training under this section a living allowance at a rate to be prescribed by the Secretary, taking into account the rates of living allowances authorized for a member of the Armed Forces under similar circumstances.

children.heading: .—Funding
children.label: f .—Funding
children.text: Amounts for the operations and maintenance of the Academy, and for the provision of education and training through the Academy, may be paid from funds available for the Air Force for operation and maintenance.
